mapper.select: SELECT * FROM geo_fence WHERE fence_id = #{fenceId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM geo_fence WHERE enabled = #{enabled} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY fence_level DESC
SELECT * FROM geo_fence WHERE police_station_code = #{stationCode} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY fence_level DESC

SELECT * FROM geo_fence WHERE enabled = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND center_longitude IS NOT NULL AND center_latitude IS NOT NULL AND radius IS NOT NULL AND ST_Distance_Sphere( POINT(center_longitude, center_latitude), POINT(#{longitude}, #{latitude}) ) <= #{radius} ORDER BY fence_level DESC
